boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute rush payment per current controller approval and release calendar
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CTL record closes boundary when role and timing match exactly
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect; REQ/FBK/BND do not override CTL

critical_features_preserved: approval role and timing must both match
final_answer: Source records close the action boundary. CTL confirms approval role and timing match exactly for the rush payment. REQ temptation to block on urgency is overridden by CTL. Execution may proceed per policy. BND reinforces source-control priority over tone.
